pageContext.name: Mighty Nein Portrait Series (Set of 9)
pageContext.description: A tale of seven friends, who became eight, then nine. Wild swells of adventure and love, and guilt, and redemption. Family. Truth.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Mighty Nein Portrait Series (Set of 9) Fine Art Print Series, a heroic collection of Critical Role artwork by artist Sam Hogg.  Inspired by Art Nouveau portraiture, Sam Hogg captures the beauty, brilliance, and badassery of the heroes of Critical Role: Campaign 2 in this collectible series. The Mighty Nein Portrait Series (Set of 9) unites eight beloved adventurers and the guiding force of the Hands of Fate in one dazzling collection for Critters who don't want to split the party! This art print series includes Mighty Nein members Fjord, Beau, Caduceus, Veth, Jester, Caleb, Yasha, and Molly, each in their own spotlight illustration surrounded by symbols and familiar faces representing their journey through Wildemount. Each portrait is packed with detail that will leave you exploring every nook and cranny of Exandria to relive this team's most memorable moments.  Each individual print in the Mighty Nein Portrait Series (Set of 9) features an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the official Critical Role collection from Sideshow. The complete set is available unframed or in a custom framed format, allowing fans to arrange this gallery of heroes to their hearts' content and create the ultimate tribute to this beloved adventuring team.  Put your fate in your hands and take a chance with the Mighty Nein Portrait Series (Set of 9) Fine Art Print series by Sam Hogg today!
